editorNotes.purpose: Lists Markdown fragments concatenated (in order) into the static system-prompt core for own-engine. Core fragments are immutable product constraints that never vary per request — they are mtime-cached per process. Per-request signal lives in `buildDynamicContext()` (brief, scaffold variant, route plan, contracts, etc.).
doNotPutInTheseFiles: Per-request custom instructions from the builder UI
Full scaffold JSON or serialized scaffold body
Route plan, pre-generation contracts, template-library matches
Structured brief fields from deep brief (unless you intentionally duplicate — avoid)
Visual rules that vary per domain/tone (those should ride brief or scaffold-variant data)
editorNotes.migrationNote: Consolidated from 15 fragments in the previous config/codegen-static-prompt.json. The directive cascade (config/prompt-directives/ + directive-loader.ts + codegen-directives-manifest.json) was removed 2026-04-18 — only `visual-design` and `content-voice` were ever runtime-injected, so they are now plain core fragments (`03-visual-design.md`, `04-coding-direction.md`). Brief and scaffold variant carry the per-request signal that those directives' aspirational `<!-- default -->` placeholders pretended to switch on.
